mapper.select:
SELECT loginID , user_type, name, status FROM tb_userinfo WHERE user_type = "I" AND status = 'R' AND name IS NOT NULL
AND loginID != #{mainProfId}
SELECT class_id , class_name , people_limit, status FROM course_class WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY class_name
SELECT time_code , start_time, end_time FROM course_time ORDER BY time_code

SELECT tb_user.name as inst_name , sub_user.name as sInst_name , cour.course_id , cour.title , substr(cour.start_date,1,10) as start_date , substr(cour.end_date,1,10) as end_date , count(stu_cour.stu_cou_id) as stu_cnt , cour_cla.people_limit , CASE WHEN (cour.cos_sta_code = -1) THEN '거절' WHEN (cour.cos_sta_code = 0) THEN '대기중' WHEN (cour.cos_sta_code = 1) THEN '승인' END as status FROM course cour left join student_course stu_cour on cour.course_id = stu_cour.course_id left join course_status cour_stat on cour.cos_sta_code = cour_stat.cos_sta_code left join tb_userinfo tb_user on tb_user.loginID = cour.professor left join course_class cour_cla on cour.class_id = cour_cla.class_id left join tb_userinfo sub_user on sub_user.loginID = cour.sub_prof WHERE (cour.professor = #{loginID} OR cour.sub_prof = #{loginID}) and cour.course_isDeleted = 0 and tb_user.status = 'R' GROUP BY cour.course_id, cour.title, cour.start_date, cour.end_date, tb_user.name, sub_user.name, cour_cla.people_limit, cour.cos_sta_code ORDER BY start_date desc LIMIT #{pageIndex}, #{pageSize}
SELECT count(cour.course_id) as totalcnt FROM course cour WHERE (cour.professor = #{loginID} OR cour.sub_prof = #{loginID}) and cour.course_isDeleted = 0

SELECT tb_user.name as inst_name , cour.course_id , cour.cos_sta_code , cour.title , substr(cour.start_date,1,10) as start_date , substr(cour.end_date,1,10) as end_date , cour.content , cour.notice , cour.plan , cour.sub_prof , cour.class_id , cour.time_code , count(stu_cour.stu_cou_id) as stu_cnt , cour_cla.people_limit , cour_cla.class_name FROM course cour left join student_course stu_cour on cour.course_id = stu_cour.course_id left join tb_userinfo tb_user on tb_user.loginID = cour.professor left join course_class cour_cla on cour.class_id = cour_cla.class_id WHERE cour.course_id = #{courseId} AND tb_user.status = 'R' GROUP BY cour.course_id, cour.cos_sta_code, cour.title, cour.start_date, cour.end_date, cour.content, cour.notice, cour.plan, cour.sub_prof, cour.class_id, cour.time_code, cour_cla.people_limit, cour_cla.class_name
mapper.update: update course set course_isDeleted = 1 WHERE course_id = #{courseId}
mapper.select:
SELECT tb_user.name as inst_name , sub_user.name as sInst_name , cour.course_id , cour.title , substr(cour.start_date,1,10) as start_date , substr(cour.end_date,1,10) as end_date , count(stu_cour.stu_cou_id) as stu_cnt , cour_cla.people_limit , CASE WHEN (cour.cos_sta_code = -1) THEN '거절' WHEN (cour.cos_sta_code = 0) THEN '대기중' WHEN (cour.cos_sta_code = 1) THEN '승인' END as status FROM course cour left join student_course stu_cour on cour.course_id = stu_cour.course_id left join course_status cour_stat on cour.cos_sta_code = cour_stat.cos_sta_code left join tb_userinfo tb_user on tb_user.loginID = cour.professor left join course_class cour_cla on cour.class_id = cour_cla.class_id left join tb_userinfo sub_user on sub_user.loginID = cour.sub_prof
AND (cour.professor = #{loginID} OR cour.sub_prof = #{loginID}) and cour.course_isDeleted = 0
and 1=1
and cour.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')
AND 1=2
and start_date >= #{search_sdate} and end_date < #{search_edate}
GROUP BY cour.course_id, cour.title, cour.start_date, cour.end_date ORDER BY
cour.title inst_name cour.start_date cour.end_date cour.course_id
DESC ASC
cour.start_date DESC
LIMIT #{pageIndex}, #{pageSize}

SELECT count(cour.course_id) as tot_cnt FROM course cour left join student_course stu_cour on cour.course_id = stu_cour.course_id left join course_status cour_stat on cour.cos_sta_code = cour_stat.cos_sta_code left join tb_userinfo tb_user on tb_user.loginID = cour.professor left join course_class cour_cla on cour.class_id = cour_cla.class_id WHERE (cour.professor = #{loginID} OR cour.sub_prof = #{loginID}) and cour.course_isDeleted = 0
and cour.title LIKE concat('%',#{sname},'%')
-- group by cour.course_id, cour.title, cour.start_date, cour.end_date
